mapper.select: SELECT id, knowledge_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, content_type, parse_status, vector_status, chunk_count, token_count, error_message, extra_metadata, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_knowledge_document WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_knowledge_document (knowledge_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, content_type, parse_status, vector_status, chunk_count, token_count, error_message, extra_metadata, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{knowledgeId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{contentType}, #{parseStatus}, #{vectorStatus}, #{chunkCount}, #{tokenCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{extraMetadata}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_knowledge_document WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}
